ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills

Installable GitHub library of 1,326+ agentic skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Antigravity, and more. Includes installer CLI, bundles, workflows, and official/community skill collections.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rajkumardusad/IP-Tracer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [objective-c] BranchMetrics/xamarin-branch-deep-linking-attribution
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BranchMetrics/xamarin-branch-deep-linking-attribution
Language: objective-c
The Branch Xamarin SDK for deep linking and attribution. Branch helps mobile apps grow with deep links / deeplinks that power paid acquisition and re-engagement campaigns, referral programs, content sharing, deep linked emails, smart banners, custom user onboarding, and more.
